summary: The page reproduces all 11 sections in correct order with EDS signature classes present and text largely faithful to the design. The most significant issue is the hero banner: the background image and all hero content/CTA fail to render, leaving only an empty gradient bar, which is the largest visual mismatch.

issues.expected: Full hero image with headline 'Put curing hepatitis C on your', TO-DAY LIST logo, 'Why EPCLUSA?' CTA button and patient image
issues.actual: Renders only an empty gradient pill/bar; hero image and all overlay content are missing (75-98% mismatch in top regions)
issues.fix: Fix .ep-hero-inner/.ep-hero-img so the hero image loads and the absolutely-positioned content displays over it

issues.expected: Slate blue-gray bar (#50758A approx) matching primary teal theme
issues.actual: Renders dark charcoal/near-black bar in top strip
issues.fix: Verify .ep-secondary-nav background-color #50758A is applied and not overridden

issues.actual: rgb(34,34,34) / rgb(33,37,41) for several ISI and RTF lines
issues.fix: Set color to #000000 for ep-isi-bold, ep-rtf-bold, and ISI headings

issues.expected: Body font-size 15px, font-weight 700 for 'What is EPCLUSA?' and 'Hepatitis B' lines
issues.actual: font-size 18px and font-weight 400 in measured styles
issues.fix: Apply 15px / 700 weight per spec to the affected RTF paragraphs

issues.expected: export icons at x≈763 and x≈903
issues.fix: Adjust nav link spacing/gaps to shift icons right
Adjust card2 padding/layout to match icon positions

issues.expected: Underlined links in neutral/teal per design (black/teal)
issues.actual: fda.gov/medwatch and 'Please see Important Facts' links render in red (--gs-primary)
issues.fix: Set ep-rtf-ul link color to match design rather than primary red

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈763px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈903px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈314px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈877px (check column/alignment classes)
